texto: Writing THE LITTLEST HUNTER: THE JOURNEY BEGINS the first book is The Littlest Series. Sharing my stories with everyone allows me to reach out to all the two-year-old to eight-year-olds everywhere helping them experience the adventures involving a young boy who communicates with animals promoting life-lessons and caring for one another. It has been gratifying to see my test audience of three and five-year-old's responding as they hear the story’s adventures
